chapters.unit_name: Unit 10: Biomolecules Carbohydrates. Proteins, Enzymes, Vitamins Nucleic Acids, Hormones Note: The following topics are included in the syllabus but will be assessed only formatively to reinforce understanding without adding to summative assessments. This reduces academic stress while ensuring meaningful learning. Schools can integrate these with existing chapters as they align well. Relevant NCERT textual material is enclosed for reference.
